prompt: First, replace the background of the first image with the sunset from the second image, and then crop the resulting image into the shape of the African continent as shown in the third image.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1. Replace the current orange patterned background of Image 1 with the full sunset landscape, including the sky and ground silhouettes, from Image 2. After applying this new background, crop the entire modified image to conform precisely to the distinct geographical outline of the African continent as depicted in Image 3.
objects: African continent outline (as the final image shape)
Orange patterned background (should not be present)
